conflicts: recommended_path_conflict: reviewers proposed different recommended paths

elegance.overall_assessment: The branch is coherent and the architectural broadening is justified, but the compact radius treatment still looks slightly example-driven rather than fully content-driven. I see one low-risk elegance refinement before this is fully clean.
elegance.recommended_path: Address the sizing polish on the compact radius control, then proceed.

performance.overall_assessment: Acceptable: the bounded package shows a targeted controller-ownership refactor and compact radius action change with no obvious performance regression; residual risk is limited to normal scroll-driven rebuild frequency.
performance.recommended_path: Proceed without performance-specific changes; keep the existing validation gates if runtime scroll responsiveness still needs confirmation.

test-quality.overall_assessment: Directionally sound, but not delivery-ready from a test-quality standpoint because the package shows only summary-level evidence for a broad controller-boundary refactor and does not fully prove the home scroll-to-compact path end-to-end.
test-quality.recommended_path: Add one screen-level integration test for the home agenda scroll-to-compact transition and attach log-level browser-validation evidence before merge.

exact_next_step: Prepare a contradiction note, run the follow-up no-context challenge if needed, adjudicate the conflict explicitly, then open the next round.
